sections.paragraph:
ϰἀϰεῖνος, η, ο [= ϰαὶ ἐκεῖνος] in ref. to someone/someth. mentioned earlier in the narrative

—a. of pers. and/also that one or and/also he, she Mk 12:4f; Lk 11:7; 20:11; 22:12; J 6:57; 7:29 (and he’s the one who); 14:12; 17:24; Ac 5:37; 15:11; 18:19; Ro 11:23; 1 Cor 10:6; 2 Ti 2:12; Hb 4:2.

—b. of animals or things and it (too) J 10:16 (in imagery: sheep); and it/that ϰα’ϰεῖνα ϰοινοῖ and that’s what really defiles Mt 15:18; ϰα’ϰεῖνα μὴ ἀφιέναι but not ignore the other (matters) Mt 23:23.
